overall.description: First-person exploration through a cyberpunk waterfront shanty town at night in a video game. The player walks along wooden walkways between rustic structures illuminated by red and green neon lights, with massive holographic skyscrapers visible across the canal in the background.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow enclosed wooden corridor flanked by shanty buildings illuminated with red neon light. As the camera moves forward, the space opens up around the 8-second mark to reveal a waterfront promenade with a stunning view of neon-lit skyscrapers across the canal, their holographic advertisements reflecting in the water.

segments.scene_description: Walking along the open waterfront promenade with an unobstructed view of the massive neon-lit skyline across the canal. The wooden walkway continues past small shanty structures on the right while the metal railing separates the path from the water on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow shanty passage with green neon lighting and metal stairs

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a narrow enclosed passage with distinctive green neon lighting replacing the previous red tones. The camera walks past metal stairs and corrugated metal walls, encountering a seated figure against the wall. The water canal remains visible in the distance to the left while the path winds through the shanty structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow utility corridor with industrial elements and scattered debris

events.description: passing a standing figure near doorway in the narrow passage

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through a narrow utility corridor with industrial elements including ventilation units, utility boxes, and chain link fencing. The green neon lighting gives way to warmer artificial light as the camera passes a standing figure near a doorway. The wooden walkway continues past scattered debris with the neon skyline occasionally visible in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a cyberpunk shanty town, moving from claustrophobic red-lit corridors into an expansive waterfront view before winding back into industrial green-lit alleys. It begins within a narrow wooden corridor flanked by shanty buildings bathed in red neon, which suddenly opens up into a wide promenade overlooking a canal and a massive skyline of holographic skyscrapers. As the camera tracks along the wooden walkway and metal railing, the unobstructed view of the neon city remains constant until the path shifts back into a confined passage where green neon lighting replaces the red tones. The scene then winds past corrugated metal walls and a seated figure, eventually transitioning into a utility corridor filled with ventilation units and chain-link fencing. Finally, the green glow gives way to warmer artificial light as the camera passes a standing figure and scattered debris, with the distant neon skyline occasionally flickering through the industrial gaps.
